warnings: This file combines two related tables on page 11 into one schedule: the top-left symbol/spec legend table (สัญลักษณ์ + รายการสุขภัณฑ์, text is clearly legible) and the bottom elevation-icon row with mounting-height dimensions (มาตรฐานระดับการติดตั้งสุขภัณฑ์). The legend descriptions are high-confidence direct text reads. The mount_height_mm values were inferred by visually aligning dimension numbers (e.g. 0.80, 0.60, 1.00, 0.50, 1.60, 0.90) with the icon directly above/below them in the bottom row — this positional matching was not zoomed/verified pixel-by-pixel, so treat heights as best-effort, not certain.
WC.1, WC.2, F1, M., and FD. have no height dimension in the bottom row (they are floor-mounted, wall-embedded, or without a labeled leader) — left as null rather than guessed.
See sibling file บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า11_wc1_plan.json for the floor plan (แปลนห้องน้ำ WC.1) that these fixtures are placed in.
Sheet also contains cross-reference arrows to sheet A-10 (view markers 1 and 2) for the room's interior elevations — see บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า12.json.
